heading: Sunday Night
text: Skies becoming clear north to south.Chance of fog in the river valleys, especially northeast. Cooler. Lows from the upper 40s to low 50s. North wind diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Monday
text: Sunny, a few feathery high clouds. Highs from the mid to upper 70s, nearing 80 in the warmer valleys. Light north wind.

heading: Monday Night
text: Mostly clear and cool. Lows from the upper 40s and low 50s, mid 50s around Lake Champlain, a few low 40s in the cold spots in the north.
